_meta.purpose: Canonical facts for the RN advisory AI tool. The SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH that resolves the known doc conflicts (stale $350 pricing, first-person voice, anonymity/no-photo, Internal-Medicine). Every advisory answer defers to this over any other doc.
_meta.sync_rule: When pricing/scope/voice/policy changes, update Attachment L + CLAUDE.md + RN FAQ + THIS file in the same change so they never drift.

pricing.record_review_refund_rule: The $50 record review fee is NON-REFUNDABLE. NEVER tell a veteran (or imply) that it is refunded if we decline. Any refund is the physician's private, out-of-band, case-by-case decision — never stated as policy. Route any refund question to Dr. Ryan / the Team Lead; do not quote a refund.
pricing.grandfathered_350_note: Grandfathered rate for pre-2026-05-25 pipeline/returning customers ONLY, charged via the EMR's dedicated button. Never quote to anyone else.
pricing.refund_guarantee_scope: Defective letter WE delivered, NOT a VA denial of a sound opinion. Delivered-letter refunds escalate to Team Lead / Dr. Ryan.

scope.service: Independent medical opinion (nexus letter) by record review only.

timeline.rule: Quote specifics, never 'soon'. Never promise a date the doctor has not committed to.

records.we_supply: the medical literature (occasionally one specific number)
records.do_not_re_ask: Anything the VA already conceded (current dx already conceded, TERA/noise exposure already conceded).

voice_identity.public_physician_name: Dr. Ryan or Dr. Ryan K.
voice_identity.sayable_truth: A board-certified physician reviews and signs every letter.

positioning.async_online: A feature, not a flaw. Never disparage our own model.
